691602a27d915f22ebc37804.name: 👋 Welcome!
691602a27d915f22ebc37804.desc:
**Overview**
Welcome to our public roadmap! Tower Defense Simulator continues to grow thanks to the amazing support from our community. With this board, we aim to keep you involved in our development process by giving you a clear look at what’s coming next, when you can expect new updates, and how progress is going behind the scenes.

‌

**Links**

6916045c9a4478d0eb323016.name: ⚠️ Disclaimer: Everything is subject to change.

6916055fdb76ed30143ef02e.name: Gamemode: Frost Mode
6916055fdb76ed30143ef02e.desc: A harder endgame gamemode offering difficulty beyond Fallen.

69160556505147afcdd89395.name: Event: The Final Act
69160556505147afcdd89395.desc: Welcome, welcome! Prepare to feast your eyes on this most SPECTACULAR show! Witness a tragic story filled with beauty and madness. Laugh and cry as this breathtaking performance sends you into shock, my dear audience. The stage is set, and my actors are ready. So sit back, my puppets—I mean, my beloved guests—and let the show BEGIN!

691b51c25a654aec5c1adfe6.name: Map Difficulty Reward Scaling
691b51c25a654aec5c1adfe6.desc: Map rewards will scale with map difficulty.

691605729122c851a1f99140.name: Tower: Tesla Tower
691605729122c851a1f99140.desc: Tesla tower is an evergreen intermediate tower, filling a higher damage archetype with an active ability to help even for gamemodes like Fallen

69e92e43489fff57636b4ceb.name: Tower: Saboteur
69e92e43489fff57636b4ceb.desc: Totally been here the entire time… surely

69e93027cb8de45b8460e45a.name: Tower: Juggernaut
69e93027cb8de45b8460e45a.desc: Evolved from Minigunner. A massive heavy-weapons tower built for overwhelming firepower and frontline support.

69e930177d99e9ace2c816f4.name: Tower: Operator
69e930177d99e9ace2c816f4.desc: Evolved from Scout. A coordinated early-game tower that grows stronger when deployed in squads.

6a18c3826b640b906fe7035d.name: Tower: Kingpin
6a18c3826b640b906fe7035d.desc: Evolved from Crook Boss. A powerful crime boss that builds an empire through cash, contracts, and hired muscle.

6a1727aedbd230f2536af9ca.name: Tower: Enforcer
6a1727aedbd230f2536af9ca.desc: Evolved from Shotgunner. A tactical shotgun tower that controls crowds and calls in backup when things get messy.

69160586f25e1f4e5986a34d.name: Economy Update
69160586f25e1f4e5986a34d.desc:
**Chroma Currency**
Chroma is a new currency centered around cosmetic progression. It will be used for crafting skins, purchasing items in the daily shop, and interacting with future cosmetic features.

**Skin Quantities & Crafting**
Skins will now have quantity counts, letting players collect and stack duplicates. These duplicates can be used as materials in the crafting system to create new skins, giving every skin drop additional value and expanding long-term cosmetic progression.

6a1a07c3ad33e160d14c7908.name: Tower: Mecha Base
6a1a07c3ad33e160d14c7908.desc: Evolved from Military Base. An advanced base that deploys mechs and brings high-impact battlefield abilities.

6a57b26d499a372ad42696c6.name: Tower: Executioner Rework
6a57b26d499a372ad42696c6.desc: Rework the Executioner to be up to modern standards and expand on its existing functionality to create a tower that stands out from Boomerang.
